title: Clear Lava
body:
Clear Lava is a texture pack that makes lava transparent, allowing you to see through it while keeping its bright, fiery look. Perfect for exploring caves, building lava bases, or improving visibility in the Nether.

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/2214083e-89b0-4b45-8aa0-d262c4255507.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/nikinok)
